name: Word2DictMatcher

values.name: findRelevantDict
values.comment:
Finds the sentences with the most occurances from a search string
Returns all the words from the matched sentence as a dictionary, which you can later convert to Html msg.
values.type: Dict.Dict String.String Basics.Int -> List.List (Dict.Dict String.String Basics.Int) -> Maybe.Maybe (Dict.Dict String.String Basics.Int)

values.comment: This will make a dictionary from data and do some tokenization as well.
